subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí! The successive letters sent unto thee by the beloved ones of the land of Khá - upon them be My Glory - have been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی نامهای متتابعه احبای ارض خا علیهم بهائی که بشما فرستادند عبد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @unity; oneness of humanity
